title: Review a network client change for resilience
description: Check timeouts, retry safety, backpressure, pooling, and TLS before accepting a client-side change.
body: Steps: 1. Confirm every new call sets connect/read/overall timeouts. 2. Verify retries are bounded, jittered, classify errors correctly, and only apply to idempotent operations (or carry an idempotency key). 3. Check that concurrency/queues are bounded so backpressure exists. 4. Confirm connections are pooled and bodies closed so there is no leak. 5. Verify TLS verification is intact. Rollback point: the change is reversible per file. Validation: each item has a test or trace as evidence; a client change missing a timeout or retrying a non-idempotent call is unverified.
